title: Creamy Cabbage Salad
description: A refreshing salad made with sautéed cabbage, sour cream, and crumbled feta cheese.
instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced cabbage and cook, stirring occasionally, until it's softened and lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt, sour cream, salt, and black pepper.
4. Add the cooked cabbage, chopped salad, and crumbled feta cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined.
5. Stir in the chopped fresh dill.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
7. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
